title: Unlocked World Border
description: A Mod that allows going outside of the World Border, and allowing interaction with blocks outside of it!
body:
You ever just wish you could go "live" outside of the Minecraft World Border? Well now you can! This mod allows you to go beyond the World Border, even interacting with blocks outside it!

Build your house there! Destroy your friends house! Hell! Explore further if you feel so daring!

Don't stay out for long though... You might get lost and never come back.

# Features
- Allows going outside of the border, placing blocks, breaking blocks, etc.
- Purple-ish tint when going outside of the border.
- When saving border scale, making the border shrink over time scales the amount of damage the border deals.

# Commands
(Only server operators can execute these!)
- /uwb info - Tells you important information about the border.
- /uwb save - Save current border scale.
- /uwb clear - Clears current saved border scale.
- /uwb mobdamage - Toggle on/off mobs taking damage outside of the border.



**This mod was made as a commission for [Rareblin](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCnTN-0q7Wv1zqvBXQ_g4gZA)!**

**Thank you TheGaboDiaz for the mod icon!**
